narrative:
Jefferson Township has 1,497 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.6 percentage points.
